rationale: Educ. Code §31.001 governs free instructional materials for students. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: Instructional materials selected for use in the public schools shall be furnished without cost to the students attending those schools.
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
